# Heroicons Quick Reference

Default icon source for this skill. All outline variants — 24×24 viewBox, stroke 1.5, `currentColor`, `fill="none"`, `stroke-linecap="round"`, `stroke-linejoin="round"`.

When in doubt, browse the full set at https://heroicons.com and copy the SVG directly. The paths below cover the icons that show up most often in talking-head animations.

## Common SVG wrapper

```html
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"
     stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor"
     stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
  <!-- path(s) here -->
</svg>
```

---

When a needed icon isn't here, browse https://heroicons.com and copy the SVG markup directly. The outline variant is the house style.
